title: Isolation of total DNA from Synechocystis sp. PCC 6803
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"be9fg","text":"This protocol can be used for extraction of total genomic DNA from Synechocystis sp. PCC 6803.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":67,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"1oegm","text":"Wear goggles, a lab coat and gloves when handling chloroform and phenol. Work under the fume hood.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9b33e","text":"Wear googles when handling liquid nitrogen.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Grow 50 mL Synechocystis culture to the end of the logarithmic phase (OD 750 ≈ 1.0). Centrifuge at 4800 rpm and 4°C for 7 minutes. Remove supernatant.
Resuspend cells in 10 mL TE-buffer, centrifuge at 4800 rpm and 4°C for 7 minutes. Remove supernatant.
Repeat washing step. Resuspend pellet in 1 mL TE-buffer. Flash freeze in liquid nitrogen or dry ice.
TE-Puffer : 10 mM Tris/HCl ; 1 mM EDTA ; pH 8.0 TE+S-Puffer : 25% (w/v) Sucrose; 50 mM Tris/HCl ; 1 mM EDTA, pH 8.0
Add 5 mg · mL -1 l ysozyme (optional: + 100 mM EDTA). Incubate 1 hour at 37˚C. 01:00:00
Add 14,4 µL Proteinase K (20 mg/mL stock) + 100 µL 20 % SDS. Incubate 1 hour at 60 ˚C. (Alternatively, incubation can be carried out at 37 ˚C for 16 hours). 01:00:00
Add 1 volume of Phenol/Chloroform (1:1 v/v). Mix well. Centrifuge for 10 min at 13000 rpm and 4° C.
Transfer upper, aqueous phase to a fresh tube. Add 1 volume of Phenol/Chloroform (1:1 v/v). Mix well. Centrifuge for 10 min at 13000 rpm and 4° C.
Transfer upper, aqueous phase to a fresh tube. Add 1 volume of Chloroform in order to remove residual phenol. Mix well. Centrifuge for 10 minutes at 13000 rpm and 4° C.
Add 0.7 volumes of isopropanol to the sample. Incubate for 5 minutes at RT. 00:05:00
Centrifuge for 30 minutes at 13000 rpm and 4° C.
Wash pellet with 1 mL 70 % EtOH. Centrifuge for 10 minutes at 13000 rpm and 4˚C.
Resuspend DNA pellet in 30-100 µL TE-buffer. Add 2 µL RNase A Incubate 30 minutes at 37˚C. 00:30:00
Heat inactivate RNase A by incubating for 10 minutes at 72 ˚C. 00:10:00
creator: Anna Behle
